hero.title: TurfScore
hero.description: Real-time cricket scoring for turf matches. Log a ball in under 2 seconds, sync to every device instantly, and get auto-calculated overs, run rates, and strike rates — no spreadsheets required.

whyTurfScore.label: WHY TURFSCORE
whyTurfScore.title: Built for the speed of turf cricket.
whyTurfScore.description: Everything you need to run a proper match — without spreadsheets, group chats or arguments about the score.

cards.title: Ultra Fast Scoring
cards.description: Log every ball in under 2 seconds with one-tap controls built for the sideline scorer.

cards.title: Real-time Sync
cards.description: Every run, wicket and boundary reflects instantly on every device watching the match.

cards.title: Auto Calculations
cards.description: Runs, overs, strike rates and run rates update automatically so you can focus on the game.

cards.title: Match Analytics
cards.description: Get post-match summaries with batter, bowler and partnership stats in one place.

howItWorks.label: HOW IT WORKS
howItWorks.title: Run a full match in simple steps.
howItWorks.description: Start a new session, configure your teams, and begin tracking the score instantly on any device.

cards.title: Create Session
cards.description: Start a fresh match room and generate a unique code for players and scorers.

cards.title: Add Teams & Players
cards.description: Set up both teams, add player names and reuse saved squads for future matches.

cards.title: Set Match Details
cards.description: Choose toss winner, batting order, overs and playing XI before starting.

cards.title: Start Live Scoring
cards.description: Score every ball live and instantly share results, stats and scorecards.

contact.title: Ready to score smarter?
contact.description: Have questions or want to get in touch? We’d love to hear from you.
